description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the global image mgoral/super-ci-runner:latest, with stages test, publish, and deploy, and a global before_script that runs pip3 install tox. In the test stage add a test job that runs tox -e py35 and tox -e py36, and a test-coverage job that runs tox -e coverage, allows failure, and stores coverage.xml and htmlcov/ as artifacts named coverage that expire in 30 days. In the publish stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, executes pwd before moving htmlcov/ to public/, allows failure, and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact that expires in 30 days. In the deploy stage add a dist job that runs only on tags or triggers, installs deployment requirements via pip3 install -rreqs/requirements-deploy.txt, builds source and wheel distributions with python3 setup.py sdist and python3 setup.py bdist_wheel, and uploads them to PyPI using twine upload dist/* -u "$PYPI_USER" -p "$PYPI_PASS", storing the dist/ directory as an artifact named ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}. Also in the deploy stage add a docker job that runs only on tags or triggers, uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service, logs into the GitLab Container Registry with docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" -p "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" $CI_REGISTRY, builds the image with docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest" . , and pushes both tags with docker push.
